scripts.test:bdd: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('reports/bdd/mock',{recursive:true})" && node --loader ts-node/esm ./node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js tests/bdd/**/*.feature --import tests/bdd/**/*.steps.ts --tags "not @pending and not @real" --format pretty --format html:reports/bdd/mock/report.html
scripts.test:bdd:real: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('reports/bdd/real',{recursive:true})" && node --loader ts-node/esm ./node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js tests/bdd/**/*.feature --import tests/bdd/**/*.steps.ts --tags "@real and not @pending" --format pretty --format html:reports/bdd/real/report.html
